module_info.docstring:
System prompt assembly -- identity, platform hints, skills index, context files.

All functions are stateless. AIAgent._build_system_prompt() calls these to
assemble pieces, then combines them with memory and ephemeral prompts.

functions.name: _scan_context_content
functions.docstring: Scan context file content for injection. Returns sanitized content.

functions.name: _read_skill_description
functions.docstring: Read the description from a SKILL.md frontmatter, capped at max_chars.

functions.name: build_skills_system_prompt
functions.docstring:
Build a compact skill index for the system prompt.

Scans ~/.hermes/skills/ for SKILL.md files grouped by category.
Includes per-skill descriptions from frontmatter so the model can
match skills by meaning, not just name.

functions.name: _truncate_content
functions.docstring: Head/tail truncation with a marker in the middle.

functions.name: build_context_files_prompt
functions.docstring:
Discover and load context files for the system prompt.

Discovery: AGENTS.md (recursive), .cursorrules / .cursor/rules/*.mdc,
SOUL.md (cwd then ~/.hermes/ fallback). Each capped at 20,000 chars.
